problem_solved: Employees struggle to navigate complex healthcare benefits, leading to poor outcomes, missed preventive care, and higher costs
solution_description: Comprehensive healthcare navigation platform that guides members to better health, boosts engagement, consolidates benefits, and contains costs. Combines AI-powered app with live Care Guides. Nearly two decades of data and machine learning for personalization. NPS score of 67
traction_signals: 37% more likely to close cancer screening gaps
21% more likely to get annual wellness visit
$33.83 decrease in monthly spending per Care Guide user
20% less likely to have avoidable ED visits
notes: Employer/health plan focus rather than provider-facing. Strong ROI metrics for navigation and preventive care. Human Care Guides complement AI. US employer model may not translate directly to Nordic systems
